blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 555 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
